case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JASMIN AZUCENA SANCHEZ CRUZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO JANUARY 13, 2025 AT 1:30 P.M.
